question: Implement a `Counter` class with a private integer `value`. Overload the pre-increment (`++`) operator to increment the `value` and return the incremented object. Also, overload the post-increment (`value++`) operator.

test_cases.input: Counter c(5); std::cout << (++c).getValue() << std::endl; std::cout << c.getValue() << std::endl;
Counter c(10); std::cout << (c++).getValue() << std::endl; std::cout << c.getValue() << std::endl;
Counter c(20); Counter d = ++c; Counter e = d++; std::cout << c.getValue() << std::endl; std::cout << d.getValue() << std::endl; std::cout << e.getValue() << std::endl;
